targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '5m') AS time, signal_type, COUNT(*) AS signals FROM signals WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND acted_on = true GROUP BY 1, signal_type ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '5m') AS time, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN acted_on = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS rejection_pct FROM signals WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT COALESCE(filled_at, settled_at, created_at) AS time, SUM(pnl_cents) OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(filled_at, settled_at, created_at)) / 100.0 AS cumulative_pnl FROM orders WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(filled_at, settled_at, created_at)) AND status = 'filled' AND pnl_cents IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders WHERE created_at > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, strategy, brier_score FROM strategy_performance WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND brier_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date

SELECT $__timeGroup(o.filled_at, '1h') AS time, s.signal_type, COUNT(*) AS fills FROM orders o JOIN signals s ON o.signal_id = s.id WHERE $__timeFilter(o.filled_at) AND o.status = 'filled' GROUP BY 1, s.signal_type ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(captured_at, '5m') AS time, AVG(spread) AS avg_spread FROM market_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT o.filled_at AS time, ms.spread AS spread_at_fill FROM orders o LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT spread FROM market_snapshots ms WHERE ms.ticker = o.ticker AND ms.captured_at <= o.filled_at ORDER BY ms.captured_at DESC LIMIT 1) ms ON true WHERE $__timeFilter(o.filled_at) AND o.status = 'filled' ORDER BY 1

SELECT o.ticker, c.title, o.direction, ROUND(o.fill_price::numeric, 3) AS fill_price, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.settlement_time - now()))::numeric / 60, 0) AS mins_to_settle, o.filled_at FROM orders o JOIN contracts c ON o.ticker = c.ticker WHERE o.status = 'filled' AND o.outcome = 'pending' AND c.status = 'active' ORDER BY c.settlement_time ASC
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, strategy, realized_pnl_cents / 100.0 AS pnl_dollars FROM strategy_performance WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

SELECT created_at, ticker, signal_type, direction, ROUND(model_prob::numeric, 3) AS model_prob, ROUND(market_price::numeric, 3) AS market_price, ROUND(edge::numeric, 4) AS edge, ROUND(kelly_fraction::numeric, 4) AS kelly, acted_on, rejection_reason FROM signals WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50
